summary: Iteration 28: Mobile + Web Backend Compatibility Audit - ALL 29 TESTS PASSED. Complete backend audit verified Bearer-token auth flow for mobile clients, portal/admin routes with session_token support.

POST /api/auth/login.details: Returns session_token (sess_xxx format), user_id, email, role. Works for both member and admin accounts.

GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token.details: Accepts Authorization: Bearer {session_token}, returns user info including role.

401 without token.details: All protected endpoints correctly return 401 when no Bearer token provided.

GET /api/portal/attendance/streak.details: Returns streak data with current_streak, badges

POST /api/portal/attendance/checkin.details: Records attendance check-in. Returns 400 if already checked in today.

POST /api/portal/cafe/order.details: Creates cafe order (MOCKED payment flow). Returns {order: {...}}

POST /api/portal/kids/checkin.details: Checks in child. Returns 400 if already checked in.

GET /api/admin/qr/generate.details: Returns {qr: {image_url, payload, format}} with quickchart.io QR image

GET /api/groups.details: Public groups list {data: [], page, per_page, total}

critical_code_review_comments: Bearer token auth fully working - get_session_token_from_request() correctly parses Authorization header
All portal routes use get_current_member_user() which validates Bearer token
All admin routes use get_current_admin_user() which validates Bearer token and role
session_token returned in login response for mobile clients to store
Multi-tenant role hierarchy: church_admin (50) for admin@abundant.church, member (10) for member@abundant.church
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_mobile_web_audit_iter28.py - Created 29 tests for mobile/web backend audit
seed_data_creation: TEST_Child and TEST_iter28_order created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend audit complete. All 19 endpoints tested with Bearer token auth. Key findings: (1) POST /api/auth/login returns session_token which mobile apps can store. (2) Bearer token auth works on all portal/* and admin/* routes. (3) Cafe order and merch checkout are MOCKED by design. (4) Admin role is 'church_admin' in multi-tenant hierarchy. (5) Kids checkin returns 400 if child already checked in today.

bearer_token_flow.step_3: Use Authorization: Bearer {session_token} for all subsequent requests
